exploration_notes: Added segment_match_type field across proto, generated Go, and server code. The proto gets tag 10 (next after existing 9). The generated pb.go gets a SegmentMatchType string field with matching protobuf tags and a GetSegmentMatchType() getter. The evaluation server's variant() function populates the field by fetching evaluation rules from the store and matching the first rule whose segments contain all matched segment keys, then mapping SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR to 'ALL' and SegmentOp
